title: Hyperliquid’s Valantis, modular exchange protocol
summary_title: Valantis builds 8% yield vaults on Hyperliquid's LST ecosystem
summary_description: Embedded liquidity protocols capturing arbitrage and enabling leverage on Hyperliquid's most efficient yield strategies.

key_moments.label: Valantis team intro: Ali (head of growth), Dave (co-founder), Matt
Dave explains modular AMMs as generalization of yield strategies with swap capability
Stake Type pool remains second biggest on Hyper EBM; K-Hype launch with 1000 depositors
8% APY on d-pegged Stake Type; no high-risk strategies by design, only yield with margin
Valantis arbitrage alpha: unique integration creates low-competition edge vs. fork DEXes
Institution strategy: park millions earning staking-like yields without dilution
Roadmap: Athena pool in 2-3 months, delta-neutral strategies, then basis trade tokenization
Valantis pushes product-first over points; integrates partner points for LP rewards

pull_quote: On-chain markets are a lot more inefficient than people realize. The amount of value extracted from retail traders every day is pretty insane.
